parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
class plugin_translation << (I,#428bca) Translations >> {
  {field} <u>label</u> string
  {field} description longText
  {field} manufacturerLink string
  {field} supportLink string
  {field} changelog json
  {field} customFields customFields
  {field} <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
  {field} <u>updatedAt</u> updatedAt
  {field} **pluginId** foreignKey
  {field} **languageId** foreignKey
}

class plugin << (T,#ff9999) Plugin >> {
  {field} **id** id
  {field} <u>baseClass</u> string
  {field} <u>name</u> string
  {field} composerName string
  {field} <u>autoload</u> json
  {field} active bool
  {field} managedByComposer bool
  {field} path string
  {field} author string
  {field} copyright string
  {field} license string
  {field} <u>version</u> string
  {field} upgradeVersion string
  {field} installedAt date
  {field} upgradedAt date
  {field} iconRaw blob
  {field} icon string
  {field} label translated
  {field} description translated
  {field} manufacturerLink translated
  {field} supportLink translated
  {field} changelog translated
  {field} customFields translated
  {field} <u>createdAt</u> createdAt
  {field} <u>updatedAt</u> updatedAt
  {field} translated json
}

class language << (T,#cccccc) >> {
}

class payment_method << (T,#cccccc) >> {
}

plugin_translation --> plugin
plugin_translation --> language
plugin --> payment_method

@enduml
```
